ucs.title: [LLM] DragonForce affiliate exploitation of SimpleHelp RMM (CVE-2024-57726/27/28) for downstream MSP customer compromise
ucs.description: Hunts DragonForce's signature MSP-pivot tradecraft observed in 2024-2025: chaining the SimpleHelp RMM auth-bypass + path-traversal CVEs to drop malicious files in the SimpleHelp install path and then use the abused agent (SimpleHelpRemoteAccess.exe / Remote Access.exe) to spawn discovery, credential, and payload-delivery tooling on customer endpoints. CISA, Sophos and Arctic Wolf have all attributed this exact chain to DragonForce affiliates (cluster overlaps with Scattered Spider / Octo Tempest in the M&S and Co-op intrusions).
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.process_name) as child_proc values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("Remote Access.exe","SimpleHelpRemoteAccess.exe","SimpleService.exe","JWrapper-Remote Access.exe")) AND (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","nltest.exe","whoami.exe","quser.exe","tasklist.exe","systeminfo.exe","vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","sc.exe")) by host Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.user
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| join type=outer host [| tstats summariesonly=t count as fileDrops values(Filesystem.file_name) as dropped_files values(Filesystem.file_path) as dropped_paths from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path="*\\SimpleHelp\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\JWrapper-Remote Access\\*") AND (Filesystem.file_name="*.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.dll" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.bat" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.ps1") by host]
| where fileDrops > 0
| eval risk_score = case(match(child_proc,"vssadmin|wmic"),90, match(child_proc,"powershell|mshta|rundll32|regsvr32"),70, true(),50)
| convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
| sort - risk_score lastTime
ucs.kql:
// DragonForce SimpleHelp RMM exploitation chain — suspicious child + foreign DLL/EXE drop in install path
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let SimpleHelpParents = dynamic(["remote access.exe","simplehelpremoteaccess.exe","simpleservice.exe","jwrapper-remote access.exe"]);
let SuspiciousChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","nltest.exe","whoami.exe","quser.exe","tasklist.exe","systeminfo.exe","vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","sc.exe","adfind.exe","netscan.exe"]);
let RmmDrops = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed","FileModified")
    | where FolderPath has_any (@"\SimpleHelp\", @"\JWrapper-Remote Access\", @"\SimpleHelpRemoteSupportService\")
    | where FileName endswith ".exe" or FileName endswith ".dll" or FileName endswith ".ps1" or FileName endswith ".bat" or FileName endswith ".jar"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("msiexec.exe","trustedinstaller.exe")
    | summarize DroppedFiles = make_set(FileName, 25), DropCount = count(), FirstDrop = min(Timestamp) by DeviceId, DeviceName;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName has_any (SimpleHelpParents)
| where FileName in~ (SuspiciousChildren)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| join kind=inner RmmDrops on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (FirstDrop - 1h .. FirstDrop + 24h)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName, ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Child = FileName, ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          DroppedFiles, DropCount, FirstDrop
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// DragonForce SimpleHelp RMM exploitation — Sentinel via SecurityEvent 4688 (requires cmdline auditing)
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let SimpleHelpParents = dynamic(["remote access.exe","simplehelpremoteaccess.exe","simpleservice.exe","jwrapper-remote access.exe"]);
let SuspiciousChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","nltest.exe","whoami.exe","quser.exe","tasklist.exe","systeminfo.exe","vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","sc.exe","adfind.exe","netscan.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    "\\")[-1]))
| where ParentLeaf in (SimpleHelpParents)
| where ChildLeaf  in (SuspiciousChildren)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentLeaf, ChildLeaf,
          ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: DragonForce SimpleHelp RMM Abuse - Suspicious Child Process
id: 7c4e1b6a-9f3d-4e22-8b1a-2c5f9d3a1e44
status: experimental
description: Detects DragonForce affiliate post-exploitation following SimpleHelp RMM CVE-2024-57726/27/28 - the SimpleHelp agent (Remote Access.exe) spawning interactive shells, LOLBins, or AD recon utilities.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa25-203a
  - https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2025/05/27/dragonforce-ransomware-cartel/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2025/05/03
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1218
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\Remote Access.exe'
      - '\SimpleHelpRemoteAccess.exe'
      - '\SimpleService.exe'
      - '\JWrapper-Remote Access.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
      - '\nltest.exe'
      - '\adfind.exe'
      - '\vssadmin.exe'
      - '\wmic.exe'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_parent and selection_child and not filter_machine_account
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate MSP technician using SimpleHelp to run ad-hoc administrative commands (validate against ticketing system).
level: high
ucs.rationale: Pinned to DragonForce specifically: (a) SimpleHelp parent images are the unique vector flagged in the CISA AA25-203A advisory and Sophos/Arctic Wolf reporting on DragonForce affiliate intrusions of MSPs in 2024-2025; (b) the join on file drops *inside the SimpleHelp install path* catches the path-traversal CVE artefacts before any payload runs; (c) the suspicious-child list mirrors the post-exploi

ucs.title: [LLM] DragonForce LockBit Black-derived encryption staging — BYOVD EDR-kill + Shadow Copy purge + recovery disable
ucs.description: Detects the DragonForce ransomware encryptor's pre-encryption staging sequence within a short window on one host: a vulnerable signed driver loaded by a non-standard service path (BYOVD to blind Defender/EDR), followed by Volume Shadow Copy deletion via vssadmin/wmic/PowerShell and disabling Windows Recovery via bcdedit. DragonForce builds on the leaked LockBit Black 3.0 builder and the Conti v3 builder; this triad is a fingerprint of that lineage and was reused in the M&S, Co-op and Harrods intrusions (Scattered Spider × DragonForce affiliate operation).
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.process_name) as procs values(Processes.user) as users from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process IN ("*delete shadows*","*delete catalog*","*resize shadowstorage*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process IN ("*shadowcopy*delete*","*shadowcopy*call*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*Win32_Shadowcopy*Delete*","*Remove-WmiObject*Shadowcopy*","*Get-CimInstance*Win32_Shadowcopy*Remove*")) OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process IN ("*recoveryenabled*no*","*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*"))) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*catalog*") OR (Processes.process_name="net.exe" AND Processes.process IN ("*stop*MSSQLSERVER*","*stop*Veeam*","*stop*BackupExec*","*stop*MSExchange*")) OR (Processes.process_name="sc.exe" AND Processes.process IN ("*stop*WinDefend*","*delete*Sense*","*config*WinDefend*disabled*"))) by host Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.user _time
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| eval bucket=floor(_time/600)
| eventstats dc(process_name) as distinct_techniques values(process_name) as technique_set by host bucket
| where distinct_techniques >= 2
| join type=outer host [| tstats summariesonly=t count as driver_loads values(Filesystem.file_name) as suspect_drivers from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_path="*\\System32\\drivers\\*" AND (Filesystem.file_name IN ("truesight.sys","rentdrv2.sys","gdrv.sys","aswarpot.sys","viragt64.sys","procexp152.sys","dbutil_2_3.sys","mhyprot2.sys","kprocesshacker.sys","zam64.sys","zam.sys","echo_driver.sys")) by host]
| convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
| eval risk = if(driver_loads>0, "CRITICAL - BYOVD + recovery purge", "HIGH - recovery purge chain")
| sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// DragonForce / LockBit-Black-derived encryptor pre-impact triad on a single host within 10 minutes
let Window = 10m;
let Lookback = 1d;
let KnownBYOVD = dynamic(["truesight.sys","rentdrv2.sys","gdrv.sys","aswarpot.sys","viragt64.sys","procexp152.sys","dbutil_2_3.sys","mhyprot2.sys","kprocesshacker.sys","zam64.sys","zam.sys","echo_driver.sys"]);
let ImpairAV =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "sc.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("WinDefend","Sense","WdNisSvc","SecurityHealthService") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("stop","delete","disabled"))
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring","Uninstall-WindowsFeature Windows-Defender","Add-MpPreference -ExclusionPath"))
    | extend Tech = "ImpairAV";
let KillShadows =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("delete shadows","delete catalog","resize shadowstorage"))
         or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject","Get-CimInstance Win32_ShadowCopy"))
         or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"))
    | extend Tech = "KillShadows";
let KillRecovery =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"
          and (ProcessCommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","no")
            or ProcessCommandLine has_all ("bootstatuspolicy","ignoreallfailures"))
    | extend Tech = "KillRecovery";
let KillBackupSql =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe","taskkill.exe")
          and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Veeam","BackupExec","MSSQLSERVER","SQLWriter","MSExchange","AcrSch2Svc")
          and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("stop","/F","delete","disabled")
    | extend Tech = "KillBackupSql";
let AllImpact = union ImpairAV, KillShadows, KillRecovery, KillBackupSql
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, Tech;
AllImpact
| summarize Techniques = make_set(Tech),
            CmdSamples = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 10),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            EventCount = count()
            by DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, Window)
| where array_length(Techniques) >= 2     // require chained tradecraft, not a single command
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceImageLoadEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where FolderPath has @"\System32\drivers\"
    | where FileName in~ (KnownBYOVD)
    | summarize BYOVDLoaded = make_set(FileName), BYOVDProcess = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName) by DeviceId
  ) on DeviceId
| extend Severity = iif(isnotempty(BYOVDLoaded), "Critical (BYOVD + Impact chain)", "High (Impact chain only)")
| project FirstSeen, LastSeen, DeviceName, AccountName, Severity, Techniques, BYOVDLoaded, BYOVDProcess, CmdSamples
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// DragonForce ransomware staging chain — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688 (requires cmdline auditing)
let Window = 10m;
let Lookback = 1d;
let ImpairAV = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback) and EventID == 4688 and Account !endswith "$"
    | where (NewProcessName endswith "\\sc.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("WinDefend","Sense","WdNisSvc","SecurityHealthService") and CommandLine has_any ("stop","delete","disabled"))
         or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring","Add-MpPreference -ExclusionPath"))
    | extend Tech = "ImpairAV";
let KillShadows = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback) and EventID == 4688 and Account !endswith "$"
    | where (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("delete shadows","delete catalog","resize shadowstorage"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wbadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"))
    | extend Tech = "KillShadows";
let KillRecovery = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback) and EventID == 4688 and Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"
          and (CommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","no") or CommandLine has_all ("bootstatuspolicy","ignoreallfailures"))
    | extend Tech = "KillRecovery";
let KillBackupSql = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback) and EventID == 4688 and Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName has_any ("\\net.exe","\\net1.exe","\\sc.exe","\\taskkill.exe")
          and CommandLine has_any ("Veeam","BackupExec","MSSQLSERVER","SQLWriter","MSExchange","AcrSch2Svc")
          and CommandLine has_any ("stop","/F","delete","disabled")
    | extend Tech = "KillBackupSql";
union ImpairAV, KillShadows, KillRecovery, KillBackupSql
| summarize Techniques = make_set(Tech),
            CmdSamples = make_set(CommandLine, 10),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            EventCount = count()
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, Window)
| where array_length(Techniques) >= 2
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Specific to DragonForce because (a) the encryptor is a re-skin of the leaked LockBit Black 3.0 / Conti builders, both of which hard-code the vssadmin + bcdedit + service-stop sequence — the chain itself is the YARA-equivalent; (b) the BYOVD driver allow-list (TrueSight, RentDrv2, kProcessHacker, Echo, Procexp152) matches the EDR-killers shipped by current DragonForce affiliates and used in the 202
